## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] i18n / translation

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Backend: `python -c "from app.main import app"` (import check)
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run lint` (no new warnings)
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run build` (no errors)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing project style
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation / translations
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] New and existing translations are complete (pt.json + en.json)
